Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains how IDA ("IDA", "we") collects, uses, and protects your information when you use our AI chatbot service.

blocks.label: Account data:
blocks.text: When you sign in with Google, we receive basic profile information such as name, email address, profile photo, and user ID through Supabase Auth.

blocks.label: Conversation data:
blocks.text: Messages you send and assistant responses, chat history, session titles, and interface preferences (theme, language, voice settings) are stored to provide the service and sync across devices.

blocks.label: Technical data:
blocks.text: API request logs (model, provider, tokens, status), IP addresses for rate limiting, and session metadata for security and operational analytics.

blocks.label: File uploads:
blocks.text: Images or PDFs you attach are processed for text extraction (OCR) and are not stored permanently except as part of your conversation history.

items: Provide, maintain, and improve IDA chat services.
Sync your chat history across devices.
Process AI requests, knowledge base search (RAG), and voice features.
Prevent abuse, spam, and security violations.
Meet legal obligations and respond to lawful requests.

blocks.text: Data is stored on Supabase infrastructure (database and authentication). Chat history is retained while your account is active or until you delete it. We may remove inactive data after a reasonable period per internal policy.

We use authentication session cookies (Supabase Auth) and browser local storage (localStorage/sessionStorage) for theme, UI preferences, and configuration cache. Essential cookies are required for login and sessions to work.
IDA integrates the following providers that process data under their own policies:

items: Supabase — authentication, database, session storage.
Google — OAuth login and AI models (Gemini) for chat, embeddings, OCR, and transcription.
Groq — voice transcription (optional, if configured).
xAI / OpenAI / Hugging Face — alternative AI models or TTS (if enabled by administrator).
Vercel — application hosting.

blocks.text: Conversation content may be sent to AI model providers to generate responses. Do not share sensitive information (passwords, OTPs, critical medical data) via chat.

We implement reasonable measures to protect data, including encryption in transit (HTTPS), OAuth-based authentication, and restricted server-side database access. No system is 100% secure; use the service with risks you understand.
You can:

items: Access and update your profile via the Account page.
Delete chat history from within the app.
Request account deletion by contacting the service operator.
Stop using the service at any time.

blocks.text: We may update this policy at any time. Material changes will be posted on this page with an updated date. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated policy.
For privacy questions, contact the IDA operator through the official channels of the organization operating this service.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: By accessing or using IDA ("IDA", "the service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.

blocks.text: IDA is an AI-powered digital assistant providing conversation, knowledge base search (RAG), voice input, Worksheet, Web Search, Research, Map, and related features. The service is intended for general information and does not replace professional advice (medical, legal, financial, etc.).

items: You must sign in with a valid Google account.
You are responsible for keeping your session and devices secure.
You agree to provide accurate information and not misuse others' accounts.
We may suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.

blocks.text: You agree not to:

items: Use the service for illegal, harmful, or misleading activities.
Send spam, malware, or content that infringes third-party rights.
Attempt to access systems, APIs, or other users' data without permission.
Bypass technical limits (rate limits, authentication, etc.).
Use AI output for critical decisions without independent verification.

blocks.text: IDA responses are generated by AI models and may be inaccurate, incomplete, or outdated. You are responsible for evaluating and verifying information before acting. We do not guarantee accuracy, availability, or fitness for a particular purpose.

IDA's name, logo, interface, and source code are protected by applicable law. You may not copy, modify, or distribute parts of the service without written permission, except as allowed by any open-source project license (if applicable).
You retain rights to content you submit. By using the service, you grant us a limited license to process that content to provide and improve the service.

IDA relies on third-party services (Supabase, Google, Groq, and other configured model providers). Their availability and terms apply separately. We are not responsible for disruptions caused by third parties.

To the extent permitted by law, IDA and its operators are not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from use of the service, including data loss, business interruption, or decisions based on AI output.
Our total liability is limited to amounts you paid for the service in the past 12 months, or zero if the service is provided free of charge.
We may modify, suspend, or terminate the service at any time. You may stop using the service by signing out and no longer accessing the application.
These terms may be updated. The last updated date is shown above. Continued use after changes means you accept the updated terms.
These terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Indonesia, without regard to conflict-of-law provisions, unless otherwise required by applicable regulations.
Questions about these terms may be submitted through the official channels of the IDA operator.
